watching.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
watching.thoughts: One the best screams from Ryan Gosling is from this movie LOL.

playing.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
playing.thoughts: First turn based game I've ever played. I can't put this game down. Whenever I am not playing, I am thinking about playing it! Plus the music is amazing!

playing.title: Redout 2
playing.thoughts: First racing game for me that feels like the car (or a maglev ship in this case) is going fast! Every boost is an instant dopamine hit!
